title: SettlementEventSummary
description: An aggregated summary of settlement activity for a single disbursement batch from Affirm to the merchant.

id.description: A unique identifier for this settlement event summary.

total_amount.description: Total amount disbursed in this batch in the smallest currency unit.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for this disbursement.

event_count.description: Number of individual settlement events included in this batch.

disbursed_at.description: Timestamp when the disbursement was initiated, in RFC 3339 format.
